import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/PendingOrgDocumentsPanel.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useMemo, useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";

  FileText,

import {
  documentWorkflowStore,
  useAllWorkflows
} from "/src/app/stores/documentWorkflowStore.ts";
const REVIEWER_NAME = "Emma Wilson";
const REVIEWER_ROLE = "Compliance Manager";
const statusStyles = {
  draft: { label: "Draft", className: "bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-300" },
  "pending-review": { label: "Pending Review", className: "bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400" },
  "revision-requested": { label: "Revision Requested", className: "bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400" },
  approved: { label: "Approved", className: "bg-teal-500/20 text-teal-400" },
  published: { label: "Published", className: "bg-green-500/20 text-green-400" }
};
export function PendingOrgDocumentsPanel() {
  _s();
  const workflows = useAllWorkflows();

  const [newComment, setNewComment] = useState("");

    () => workflows.filter(
      (w) => w.status === "pending-review" || w.status === "revision-requested"
    ),
    [workflows]

});
_c = PendingOrgDocumentsPanel;
var _c;

if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/PendingOrgDocumentsPanel.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
